input.prompt: A 2026 Citroen C3 Aircross SUV in a soft two-tone sage-green-over-graphite livery, captured three-quarter front on a Moroccan riad courtyard at dawn, warm terracotta walls behind, palm shadows across the hood, shallow depth of field.
